# AutoRig Online

> Cloud service for automatic 3D character rigging and animation-ready exports. Upload GLB, FBX, or OBJ models and receive rigged assets, animation previews, posters, and engine-ready files for Unity, Unreal Engine, Blender, and web viewers.

## Primary Resources

- Home and upload: https://autorig.online/
- Gallery: https://autorig.online/gallery
- Animal and non-humanoid rigging: https://autorig.online/animal-rig
- Blender plugin: https://autorig.online/blender-plugin
- Developer API overview: https://autorig.online/developers
- Agent/API skill: https://autorig.online/skill.md

## Search Discovery

- Sitemap index: https://autorig.online/sitemap.xml
- Marketing pages sitemap: https://autorig.online/sitemap/pages.xml
- Public task pages use canonical URLs in the form `https://autorig.online/task?id={task_id}`.
- Public task sitemap chunks are SEO-gated and include only completed, non-adult tasks with poster/video and LLM-enriched metadata.

## What AutoRig Does

- AI-assisted humanoid character auto-rigging.
- Animal and non-humanoid rigging for quadrupeds and stylized creatures.
- Animation retargeting and preview generation.
- Exports for GLB, FBX, OBJ-oriented workflows, Unity packages, Blender, Unreal Engine, and web previews.

## Crawler Notes

- Public pages, gallery previews, `/skill.md`, `/llm.txt`, and `/llms.txt` are intended for search and AI-agent discovery.
- Raw API internals, admin pages, auth endpoints, and raw uploaded user files are not public indexing surfaces.
